nasb.text: Now there was a young man from Bethlehem in Judah, of the family of Judah, who was a Levite; and he was staying there.

esv.text: Now there was a young man of Bethlehem in Judah, of the family of Judah, who was a Levite, and he sojourned there.

cnv.text: 有一個猶大伯利恆的青年人，是屬猶大家族的；他本是個利未人，在那裡寄居。

ccb.text: 犹大的伯利恒住着一个年轻的利未人。
